runtime_target: packet registry, routing table, and promotion decision board
operational_end_state: A reviewer can see source identity, authority, route, output impact, and next build decision.
full_build_definition: A source or packet system with inventory, provenance, authority status, routing logic, claim ceiling, promotion rule, and reconciliation tests.
minimum_operational_release: A promotion-ready source packet for Internal Operating Support Packet 024: inventory, authority classification, routing rule, claim ceiling, and reconciliation report.
required_modules_to_build: item registry | authority classifier | route selector | promotion decision
source_status: 6 source-application rows; 3 active passage contracts; 0 unlocated source candidates.
source_actions_before_claim: Complete 3 close-read contract(s), update 9 linked proof-capsule field(s), and preserve the current claim ceiling until passage notes exist.
test_suite: claim ceiling test: public claims cannot exceed built evidence | source test: metadata-routed sources require close reading before citation or quotation | privacy test: no local paths or private directories in public deploy | promotion test: item cannot advance without identity, authority, route, and next action
acceptance_tests: Reconcile register against files; verify authority classification, routing decision, duplicate/supersession handling, and citation boundary.
promotion_stage: prototype-to-full-build; source and capture checks still govern release language
current_status: limited public proof; needs stronger public-safe abstraction or new demonstrator
launch_or_review_path: Open the source packet contract for `mb-internal-operating-support-024`, reconcile source inventory, and render the promotion decision.
first_full_build: Add promotion-router examples showing how a packet becomes a room, paper, software instrument, source reservoir, archive item, or blocked record.
next_implementation_steps: 1. create or confirm runtime data schema; 2. implement one end-to-end fixture; 3. capture proof artifact; 4. run source and claim-ceiling gates; 5. publish reviewer-safe demo
public_claim_now: May claim a prototype-to-full-build path exists; do not claim completed operational system.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
